title: T1235 Directors/Trustees and Like Officials Worksheet - Canada.ca
content:
## T1235 Directors/Trustees and Like Officials Worksheet
You must download the accessible fillable PDF to your computer. Use Acrobat Reader 10 or later to open the file. Do not click the link to open it in your web browser.
- Download and save the PDF to your computer
- Open the downloaded PDF in Acrobat Reader 10 or later
This form is used by a registered charity to identify its board of directors/trustees and like officials. A charity must submit this form with its annual return.

## Ways to get the form
- Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader You must download and open fillable PDFs in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher. Accessible Fillable PDF (t1235-fill-20e.pdf) Previous years: Accessible Fillable PDFs This form is also available for the years listed below: 2019 – Fillable PDF (t1235-fill-19e.pdf) 2018 – Fillable PDF (t1235-fill-18e.pdf) 2015 – Fillable PDF (t1235-fill-15e.pdf) 2013 – Fillable PDF (t1235-fill-13e.pdf) 2009 – Fillable PDF (t1235-fill-09e.pdf) 2005 – Fillable PDF (t1235-fill-05e.pdf)

### Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader
You must download and open fillable PDFs in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher.
- Accessible Fillable PDF (t1235-fill-20e.pdf)
This form is also available for the years listed below:
- 2019 – Fillable PDF (t1235-fill-19e.pdf)
- 2018 – Fillable PDF (t1235-fill-18e.pdf)
- 2015 – Fillable PDF (t1235-fill-15e.pdf)
- 2013 – Fillable PDF (t1235-fill-13e.pdf)
- 2009 – Fillable PDF (t1235-fill-09e.pdf)
- 2005 – Fillable PDF (t1235-fill-05e.pdf)
- Print and fill out by hand Standard print PDF (t1235-20e.pdf) Large print PDF (t1235-lp-20e.pdf) Previous years: Standard print PDFs This form is also available for the years listed below: 2019 – Standard print PDF (t1235-19e.pdf) 2018 – Standard print PDF (t1235-18e.pdf) 2015 – Standard print PDF (t1235-15e.pdf) 2013 – Standard print PDF (t1235-13e.pdf) 2009 – Standard print PDF (t1235-09e.pdf) 2005 – Standard print PDF (t1235-05e.pdf) 2002 – Standard print PDF (t1235-02e.pdf)

### Print and fill out by hand
- Standard print PDF (t1235-20e.pdf)
- Large print PDF (t1235-lp-20e.pdf)
This form is also available for the years listed below:
- 2019 – Standard print PDF (t1235-19e.pdf)
- 2018 – Standard print PDF (t1235-18e.pdf)
- 2015 – Standard print PDF (t1235-15e.pdf)
- 2013 – Standard print PDF (t1235-13e.pdf)
- 2009 – Standard print PDF (t1235-09e.pdf)
- 2005 – Standard print PDF (t1235-05e.pdf)
- 2002 – Standard print PDF (t1235-02e.pdf)
- Download and listen Use your preferred screen reader to listen to the e-text file. E-text (t1235-20e.txt)
Use your preferred screen reader to listen to the e-text file.
- E-text (t1235-20e.txt)
- Ask for an alternate format You can order alternate formats such as digital audio, electronic text, braille, and large print. Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities

### Ask for an alternate format
You can order alternate formats such as digital audio, electronic text, braille, and large print.
- Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities
- T3010 Registered Charity Information Return
- T1236 Qualified Donees Worksheet/Amounts Provided to Other Organizations
- T1441 Qualifying Disbursements: Grants to Non-Qualified Donees
- T1240 Registered Charity Adjustment Request
- T2081 Excess Corporate Holdings Worksheet for Private Foundations
- T4033 Completing the Registered Charity Information Return
- Filing a complete return
- CRA-certified software for filing a charity information return

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
